---
name: Contribute an operational insight
about: Share something you know from direct experience or a source you've found — it may end up in the wiki
title: "[ATOM] Brief description of the insight"
labels: atom-contribution
assignees: aksie
---

Thanks for contributing. Fill in what you can — you don't need to complete every field.

**What process does this relate to?**
<!-- e.g. Financial Ops, People Ops, Sales Operations -->

**What stage is this most relevant to?**
<!-- Foundation / First Hires / Early Scale / Growth / Scaled -->

**The insight (1-2 sentences)**
<!-- What should someone know? Write it as plainly as you can. -->

**Why is this true?**
<!-- What's the mechanism or reasoning? This is the most valuable part — include it if you can. -->

**Source or context**
<!-- If you have a URL, paste it here. -->
<!-- If this is from your own experience, describe the situation briefly: company size, stage, what happened. -->
<!-- No source is fine — just flag it so we know it needs verification. -->

**Is this from your own direct experience?**
<!-- Yes / No / Partly -->

**Any caveats?**
<!-- Is this only true for venture-backed companies? Enterprise customers? Certain geographies? -->

---
<!-- You don't need to fill in the frontmatter below — a maintainer will handle that when adding to the pipeline. -->
<!-- But if you're comfortable with it, feel free to fill it in using wiki-pipeline/atoms/_human-template.md -->
